headline: EQT Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.165 per Share
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) is included among the 12 Most Undervalued Natural Gas Stocks to Buy Now. EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) is a premier, vertically integrated American natural gas company with production and midstream operations focused in the Appalachian Basin. On April 14, EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.165 per share. The dividend is […]
